What We Build

Full-Scope Renovation Services

Whether it's a kitchen refresh or a full commercial build-out, we deliver quality results that stand the test of time.

Kitchens & Bathrooms
Complete kitchen and bathroom renovations — from layout and plumbing to custom cabinetry, countertops, and finishing touches.
Kitchens Bathrooms Cabinetry
Basements & Interiors
Transform unfinished basements into functional living spaces. Full interior design and build services for every room.
Basements Interior Design Flooring
Exteriors & Decks
Custom decks, outdoor living spaces, siding, windows, and doors. Built for Edmonton's climate and your lifestyle.
Decks Exteriors Windows & Doors
Tiling & Flooring
Precision tile installation and premium flooring solutions including hardwood, vinyl plank, porcelain, and stone.
Tiling Hardwood Vinyl Plank
Plumbing & Lighting
Rough-in and finish plumbing, fixture installation, and complete electrical lighting design and installation.
Plumbing Lighting Electrical
Commercial Builds
Tenant improvements, office fit-outs, and commercial renovations delivered on schedule and to spec.
Commercial Tenant Improvement Office Builds
Why Diamond

The Difference Is in the Details

We're not just contractors — we're craftsmen who take pride in every nail, tile, and finish. Here's what sets us apart.

01

Expert Craftsmen

Our skilled tradespeople bring decades of hands-on experience to every project. Precision work, professional results — every single time.

02

Custom Builds

No cookie-cutter solutions. Every project is designed around your vision, your space, and your budget — from the first sketch to the final walkthrough.

03

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed in Alberta and carrying comprehensive insurance. You're protected at every stage — peace of mind is part of the package.

Our Promise
Quality You Can See
From the first consultation to the final reveal, Diamond Contracting is committed to transparent communication, on-time delivery, and craftsmanship that exceeds expectations.
